sentences.text: We've got Ned and Darren in the waiting room.
Um, are you all set here?
You got a typical playbook you go through on these first calls?
Yeah, I'll be sharing my screen and just walking through uh implementation next steps.
Um, I'm gonna let them both in and get you introduced, and then you can take it from there.
My coffee is the rim shot.
Nice to meet you, uh, officially on Zoom, Ned.
You guys mind um stopping the recording.
It's just uh yeah, yeah, yeah, sorry.
